title: Glory Arise

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In shadows deep I find my peace
Beneath Your wings, my sweet release
Till storms of hatred pass me by
In Your embrace, I safely lie

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your love reaches higher than the heavens above
Your faithfulness soars beyond the clouds
I will sing, I will sing
Till the dawn breaks through
My heart awakens to praise You
(Your love reaches higher than the heavens above)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: They set their traps with sharpened steel
Their words like swords, they make me kneel
But You arise above their schemes
Your glory shines through all my dreams

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your love reaches higher than the heavens above
Your faithfulness soars beyond the clouds
I will sing, I will sing
Till the dawn breaks through
My heart awakens to praise You
(Your love reaches higher than the heavens above)

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Let Your glory fill the earth
Let Your presence show its worth
Nations rise to hear Your name
Hearts ignite with heaven's flame

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: My soul takes flight on morning's wing
With harp and lyre, my voice will ring
Through every land and every tongue
Your endless mercy will be sung

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: From mountain peaks to ocean deep
Your promise, Lord, You always keep
Through fire and storm, through darkest night
Your mercy leads me to the light

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your love reaches higher than the heavens above
Your faithfulness soars beyond the clouds
I will sing, I will sing
Till the dawn breaks through
My heart awakens to praise You
(Your love reaches higher than the heavens above)

sections.label: Outro
lines: Higher than the heavens above
Higher than the heavens above Your love, Your love

epigraph: let thy glory be above all the earth
